_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.
subtitle: Analytics work across healthcare and enterprise environments, with emphasis on reporting quality, operational visibility, and stakeholder adoption.

experiences.title: Business Data Analyst
experiences.description: Healthcare analytics role focused on claims, enrollment, provider, member, EHR, and pharmacy data. Built reporting systems and executive dashboards that improved visibility into utilization, care gaps, cost drivers, and quality measures.
responsibilities: Built Power BI and Tableau dashboards for readmission rates, HEDIS measures, risk scores, cost per member, and executive KPI tracking
Used SQL and Python to investigate utilization trends, cost drivers, care gaps, and operational performance patterns
Partnered with product owners and clinical teams to translate requirements into analytics solutions that reduced avoidable admissions by 18%
Automated recurring reporting workflows and supported CMS, HEDIS, audit, and Agile delivery documentation

experiences.title: Business Data Analyst
experiences.description: Delivered analytics and reporting solutions for enterprise clients in healthcare and financial services. Focused on KPI reporting, SQL analysis, ETL workflows, requirements documentation, and business performance insights.
responsibilities: Developed Tableau and Power BI dashboards that improved KPI visibility and enabled 25% faster decision turnaround
Performed SQL analysis and data modeling on large transactional datasets, contributing to 15% operational cost reduction
Built automated ETL workflows with Alteryx and SSIS to consolidate data across business systems
Supported Agile teams through sprint reviews, UAT cycles, reporting specifications, data dictionaries, and stakeholder documentation
